title: The Police Act, 1949
full_text: The Police Act, 1949 पुलिस अधिनियम,1949 Rules Regulations Notifications Orders Circulars Ordinance Statutes SectionsScheduleAnnexureAppendixFormsActdetails Act ID: 194964 Act Number: 64 Enactment Date: 1949-12-27 Act Year: 1949 Short Title: The Police Act, 1949 Hindi Title: पुलिस अधिनियम,1949 Long Title: An Act to provide for the constitution of a general police-district embracing two or more Union territories and for the establishment of a police force therefor. Ministry: Ministry of Home Affairs Department: Department of Internal Security Enforcement Date: 27-12-1949 Notification: Notification not available TitleFiles TitleFiles TitleFiles TitleFiles The Police Act, 1949 Show all section Section 1. Short title, extent and commencement. Section 2. Definition. Section 3. Constitution of general police-district embracing two or more Union territories. Section 4. Constitution of one police force for general police-district. Section 5. Superintendence and administration of police. Section 6. Application of the Police Act, 1861. Section 7. Saving.
